backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core types (Trip, UserProfile, PricingConfig, etc.) and backend logic for a ride-hailing app with role-based access control for customers, drivers, and admins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features in RideRequestForm.tsx related to One Way/Round Trip drop location handling, GPS capture, and form submission logic.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Namma Driver Pilot' that mounts the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router app shell defining all routes with role-based guards, profile setup modal logic, and navigation layout for the ride-hailing frontend.
frontend/src/components/AdminTripsTab.ts: Admin UI component displaying a searchable, paginated table of all trips with status badges, fare, and location info fetched via useGetAllTripsAdmin.
frontend/src/components/AdminUsersTab.ts: Displays a searchable table of all users with their name, email, role badge, and join date, fetched via the useGetAllUsers hook.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Wraps protected routes to block rendering until Internet Identity session and role query resolve, redirecting unauthenticated users to /login and showing a timeout error panel after 9 seconds.
frontend/src/components/AvailableTripsSe: Fetches and displays a scrollable list of available trips for a driver, normalizing trip data and providing an Accept button for each trip.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTripList: Renders a scrollable list of a customer's normalized trips with status badges, pickup/dropoff locations, vehicle type, and timestamps.
frontend/src/components/DataLoadErrorBan: Shows a dismissible error banner with a refresh button when data fails to load.
frontend/src/components/DriverProfileSec: Displays a driver's profile card including duty status, service area, vehicle experience, transmission comfort, and languages, with an Edit Profile button.
frontend/src/components/DriverTripList.t: Displays a list of trips for a driver, showing pickup/dropoff locations, status badges, fare, and a 'Complete' button for accepted trips. Uses React Query hooks to fetch and mutate trip data.
frontend/src/components/EditDriverProfil: Form component for creating or editing a driver profile, including service area, vehicle/transmission experience, availability toggle, and languages. Submits data via the upsertDriverProfile mutation hook.
Modal dialog wrapper around EditDriverProfileForm that normalizes the incoming profile data before passing it to the form.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with Retry and Reset App options.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Top-level page layout component that wraps content with a Navigation header and a footer crediting caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar showing the app logo, role badge, dashboard link, backend health status (dev only), and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/OfflineBanner.ts: Dismissible sticky banner displayed when the backend is unreachable, warning users that some features may be unavailable.
frontend/src/components/PricingTab.tsx: Admin-only tab for viewing and editing the platform's pricing configuration, including local, outstation, vehicle multiplier, and commission settings, with save functionality via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for creating or updating a user profile (name, email, role), handling Candid variant encoding for roles before submitting to the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to /login using Internet Identity state.
A form component for customers to create trip requests, including conversion utilities from backend trip types to local UI trip types.
frontend/src/components/RoleGuard.tsx: A route guard that checks the user's role and either renders children, redirects to role selection, or shows a not-authorized page based on the allowed role.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionWar: A modal dialog that prompts new users to select either a customer or driver role, then navigates to the appropriate dashboard.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendHealth.ts: A hook that pings the backend actor to check reachability, returning health status and loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor via React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend interactions including role management, user/driver profiles, trips, and pricing config using the ICP actor and Internet Identity.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark mode theming using earth tones and warm greens.
frontend/src/lib/defaultConfig.ts: Exports a DEFAULT_CONFIG constant with fallback pricing configuration values for local and outstation trips, vehicle multipliers, and commission rates.
frontend/src/lib/types.ts: Defines TypeScript types and utility functions for roles, trip statuses, vehicle types, and locations, including normalization helpers for Candid variant objects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying logged-in identity info, user/trip counts, and tabbed views for managing users, trips, and pricing configuration.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUpgradePage.tsx: Page that allows a user to enter an admin setup code to upgrade their account to the admin role, with error handling and navigation on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard page that combines a ride request form with a trip list, supporting optimistic updates for newly created trips before backend refresh.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard page that displays the driver's profile section and a tabbed trips view (available trips and their own trips), with an edit profile modal.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Root landing page that redirects unauthenticated users to login and authenticated users to their role-specific dashboard based on the fetched role.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that presents an Internet Identity sign-in button and redirects already-authenticated users to the post-login landing page.
frontend/src/pages/NotAuthorizedPage.tsx: Error page shown when a user lacks permission to access a route, with a button to navigate home.
Intermediate page shown after login that fetches the user's role and redirects them to the appropriate dashboard, with error and retry handling.
frontend/src/pages/RoleSelectionPage.tsx: Legacy role selection page that lets users choose customer or driver, redirecting those who already have a role to their dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/SelectRolePage.tsx: Current role selection page where new users pick customer or driver, with redirect logic for users who already have an assigned role.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeProfile.ts: Utility functions that normalize Candid variant array fields (vehicleExperience, transmissionComfort, languages) on a driver profile into plain string arrays.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeRole.ts: Utility function that normalizes a backend role value from various Candid formats (string, variant object, or prefixed key) into a plain role string.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeTrip.ts: Defines a `NormalizedTrip` interface and `normalizeTrip` function that converts raw backend `Trip` objects into plain-string variants for safe comparisons, handling all three Candid variant encoding forms.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist values in `sessionStorage` and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/src/utils/withTimeout.ts: Exports a `withTimeout` wrapper that races a given promise against a timer, rejecting with a `TimeoutError` if the timeout expires first.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with OKLCH-based design tokens, custom border radii, accordion keyframes, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for the Namma Driver Pilot app, including architectural notes, known issues, existing features, and a pending action request to fix Drop GPS and One Way/Round Trip logic in the customer booking form.
